top_signals.title: Oil Near $100 Seen as Base Case for Next Year With Iran War
top_signals.summary: Oil market participants are increasingly pricing crude to be capped near $100 a barrel over the next year, as demand is forced to slow down to counter millions of barrels of supply losses caused by the US-Iran war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Foundation raises $6.4 million to expand from bitcoin hardware wallets into AI agent authorization
top_signals.summary: The firm also announced the general availability of its flagship Passport Prime device and expanded access to its KeyOS developer platform.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Musk, SpaceX and Muscovite fever dreams
top_signals.summary: Tech titans are in many ways the intellectual heirs of the Soviet space programme
